check.input: norm (arm-blind normalized record; never raw response, never expectations)

items.3: mechanical: falsifiable acceptance/reopen criterion (predicate in dod_check.py)
items.4: mechanical: >=1 rejected alternative with a reason (predicate in dod_check.py)

classifier.disagreement: cell excluded from both buckets, recorded

bar.frozen_question: within arm, DoD-pass beats DoD-fail on full fraction-met by >= 0.15 in BOTH corpora; below threshold in either -> H1 falsified, STOP
bar.three_state: both buckets >=5 and share <=0.90 -> TESTED else INCONCLUSIVE (never falsification)
bar.diagnostic: same machinery on exps 3+4 subset; informs REOPEN only (ADR 0061 1d)

cost.classifier: 144 x 2 families; notional recorded in results.json
